## Type of Change

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Split / merge logic change
- [ ] Worktree handling
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Refactor

## Pre-Merge Checklist

- [ ] `shellcheck cast-parallel.sh` passes
- [ ] Tested with `--dry-run` on a sample plan
- [ ] Trap handlers preserved for clean signal handling
- [ ] No hardcoded paths (use `$HOME` or `~/`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
